summary.lv: AGCSOFT meklē DevOps inženieri, kas konfigurēs un administrēs mākoņplatformas, uzstādīs CI/CD plūsmas un ieviesīs «infrastruktūra kā kods» principus ar Kubernetes, Docker, Ansible un Terraform.
summary.en: AGCSOFT is hiring a DevOps Engineer to configure and administer public-cloud platforms, set up CI/CD pipelines and implement Infrastructure-as-Code with Kubernetes, Docker, Ansible and Terraform.
